title: Gear Aid Zipper Repair Kit for Quick Outdoor Recreation Fix Camping Gear Repair
description:
Zip Tech is a heavy duty lubricant designed to protect watertight, airtight watersports zippers. It offers UV protection for nylon and plastic zippers, while protecting metal zippers from chlorine and salt. Zip Tech is non-toxic and contains no silicone or paraffin.

Gear Aid Zipper Repair Kit for Quick Outdoor Recreation Fix Camping Gear Repair

Out in the field, there's no time for a sassy zipper that unzips from behind. It leaves an opening in tents, packs, and sleeping bags where no opening should be. Get those busted zippers back on task. With Gear Aid, anyone can be a master of gear repair. Ideal for: Individuals or groups. Comes with instructions and a gear repair manual.

Key Features

  • Replace broken zippers/pulls for jackets and gear with all the proper tools to make the repair at home or in the field
  • Bring this lightweight zipper repair kit during camping, road trips, or travel; 20-piece set weighs under 3 oz
  • Use this kit for fixing zippers on tents, backpacks, luggage, and more using your own hands
  • Repair clothing and gear with a kit that includes: 6 common sliders, seam ripper, sewing needles, black thread, and 10 top stops
  • GEAR AID products help you repair your gear with confidence, ensuring it lasts through every adventure; from patching holes to fixing equipment and cleaning gear, our mission revolves around preservation and renewal.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 80071
  • UPC: 021563800715

Sewing Kit 1 Bobbin #69 Olive Green 1 Seam Ripper 1 Sewing Needle #16, Yarn
